description_long: This is a two-story modern house surrounded by a tall green hedge, featuring a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade has large, grid-style windows, a double garage door, and a main entrance with a green door and a small overhang. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and landscaped greenery with trees and shrubs. The side and rear elevations show additional large windows and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan material, likely stucco or brick, with clean, straight lines and minimal ornamentation. The property is set on a manicured lawn with paved walkways leading to the entrances.
description: A modern two-story house with large grid windows, flat roof, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio, all enclosed by a tall green hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, large grid windows, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the green hedge, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, outdoor seating, and extensive windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side windows, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single green door, small overhang, and paved walkway, flanked by large windows and a double garage door.
